title: rubus carinthiacus
intro: Rubus carinthiacus, also known as the Carinthian raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the mountains of Austria and Slovenia. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have a range of medicinal effects. The health benefits of Rubus carinthiacus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of certain types of cancer. The herbal preparations of Rubus carinthiacus can be consumed as teas, infusions, or dried extracts, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
